description: 微信公众号/服务号图文发布流程（v1.9.30：修复群发通知弹窗未点击'发表'按钮导致文章只进草稿箱的问题，新增'继续发表'确认弹窗处理步骤，修复验证步骤误判 appmsg_edit 为已跳转离开编辑页；v1.7.35：删除 step_list 前两步重复导航+等待，直接在预检后的页面提取 token；v1.7.29：封面选择使用真实坐标点击并轮询验证）

steps.value: const findToken = () => { const urlMatch = location.href.match(/token=(\d+)/); if (urlMatch) return urlMatch[1]; const links = document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="token="]'); for (const a of links) { const m = (a.href || '').match(/token=(\d+)/); if (m) return m[1]; } const htmlMatch = document.documentElement.innerHTML.match(/token[=:'"\s]+(\d{6,})/); if (htmlMatch) return htmlMatch[1]; const scripts = document.querySelectorAll('script'); for (const s of scripts) { const m = (s.textContent || '').match(/token[=:'"\s]+(\d{6,})/); if (m) return m[1]; } return null; }; let token = findToken(); if (token) { const url = 'https://mp.weixin.qq.com/cgi-bin/appmsg?t=media/appmsg_edit_v2&action=edit&isNew=1&type=10&token=' + token + '&lang=zh_CN'; setTimeout(() => { window.location.href = url; }, 0); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, token, url, source: 'home' }); } const diag = { url: location.href, bodyText: (document.body.innerText || '').slice(0, 300), linkCount: document.querySelectorAll('a').length, links: Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a')).slice(0, 15).map(a => ({ text: (a.innerText||'').trim().slice(0, 30), href: (a.href||'').slice(0, 120) })), hasWeuiName: !!document.querySelector('.weui-desktop_name'), hasAccountInfo: !!document.querySelector('.account_info'), hasDesktopCard: !!document.querySelector('.weui-desktop-card'), title: document.title }; throw new Error('token 未找到（诊断: ' + JSON.stringify(diag) + '）');
steps.descript: v1.7.34：从主页提取 token 并跳转编辑页（若提取失败抛出含诊断信息的错误）
等待跳转到编辑页（URL 含 appmsg_edit_v2）
等待编辑页加载（ProseMirror 初始化）

steps.value: const SELS = ['.weui-desktop-dialog', '.weui-desktop-modal', '[role="dialog"]', '.js_dialog', '.js_modal', '.weui-desktop-dialog__wrp', '.weui-desktop-modal__wrp', '[class*="modal"]', '[class*="dialog"]', '[class*="popup"]', '[class*="mask"]', '.tips_box', '.guide-popup', '.new-feature']; const BTNS_TEXT = ['我知道了', '知道了', '确定', '确认', '同意', '关闭', '取消', '暂不', '下次再说', '不再提示', '不再显示', '×', 'x', '关闭']; const BTNS_CLS = ['close', 'cancel', 'dismiss', 'js_close']; const dialogs = new Set(); for (const s of SELS) { document.querySelectorAll(s).forEach(d => dialogs.add(d)); } let closed = []; const allDialogInfo = []; for (const d of dialogs) { const r = d.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width <= 0 || r.height <= 0) continue; const cls = (d.className || '').slice(0, 80); const txt = (d.innerText || '').slice(0, 150).replace(/\s+/g, ' '); allDialogInfo.push({ cls, text: txt }); const btns = d.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], .weui-desktop-btn, .js_close, .close, .weui-desktop-icon-close, i[class*="close"]'); let btnClicked = false; for (const b of btns) { const t = (b.innerText || b.textContent || '').trim(); const c = (b.className || '').toLowerCase(); const isClose = BTNS_TEXT.some(k => t.includes(k)) || BTNS_CLS.some(k => c.includes(k)) || t === '×' || t === 'x'; if (isClose) { try { b.click(); closed.push(t || c.slice(0, 40)); btnClicked = true; break; } catch {} } } if (!btnClicked) { const closeIcons = d.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-icon-close, i[class*="close"], [class*="close-btn"], [aria-label*="close"], [aria-label*="关闭"]'); for (const ic of closeIcons) { try { ic.click(); closed.push('icon:' + (ic.className || '').slice(0, 40)); btnClicked = true; break; } catch {} } } } return JSON.stringify({ dialogCount: allDialogInfo.length, dialogs: allDialogInfo, closedCount: closed.length, closed });
steps.descript: 关闭公告/引导/协议弹窗（覆盖 weui-desktop-dialog/modal/popup/mask 等，点击 我知道了/确定/关闭/×/取消）
等待弹窗关闭动画

steps.value: const pm = document.querySelectorAll('.ProseMirror'); const titlePm = document.querySelector('.ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"][data-placeholder="请在这里输入标题"]'); const bodyPm = document.querySelector('.view.rich_media_content .ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"]'); const titleInput = document.querySelector('#title, input.js_title, textarea.js_title'); const ueditor = document.querySelector('#ueditor_replace, .edui-body-container, .ql-editor'); const layout = document.querySelector('.weui-desktop-layout__main'); const editor = document.querySelector('.appmsg_editor'); const info = { url: location.href, viewport: { w: window.innerWidth, h: window.innerHeight }, pmCount: pm.length, pmClasses: Array.from(pm).map(e => (e.className||'').slice(0,80)), titlePm: titlePm ? { rect: titlePm.getBoundingClientRect(), visible: titlePm.offsetWidth > 0 } : null, bodyPm: bodyPm ? { rect: bodyPm.getBoundingClientRect(), visible: bodyPm.offsetWidth > 0 } : null, titleInput: titleInput ? { tag: titleInput.tagName, id: titleInput.id, cls: (titleInput.className||'').slice(0,60) } : null, ueditor: ueditor ? { tag: ueditor.tagName, id: ueditor.id, cls: (ueditor.className||'').slice(0,60) } : null, layout: layout ? layout.getBoundingClientRect() : null, editor: editor ? editor.getBoundingClientRect() : null }; return JSON.stringify(info);
steps.descript: 诊断编辑页布局（打印 URL/viewport/ProseMirror/title/ueditor 等元素位置，排查 Worker 浏览器布局差异）

steps.value:
const titlePm = document.querySelector('.ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"][data-placeholder="请在这里输入标题"]'); const titleTa = document.querySelector('#title'); const TITLE = ARG || ''; const result = { titlePm: !!titlePm, titleTa: !!titleTa, titleLen: TITLE.length }; if (titlePm) { titlePm.focus(); const r = titlePm.getBoundingClientRect(); result.titlePmRect = { x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }; result.titlePmVisible = r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; titlePm.innerHTML = ''; document.execCommand('selectAll', false, null); document.execCommand('insertText', false, TITLE); if (titlePm.innerText.trim().length === 0) { titlePm.innerHTML = '

' + TITLE + '

'; } // 触发完整事件序列，确保 React state 同步 ['input','keyup','keydown','change','blur'].forEach(evt => { titlePm.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input', { bubbles: true, inputType: 'insertText', data: TITLE })); titlePm.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup', { bubbles: true, key: TITLE.slice(-1) || 'a' })); }); titlePm.blur(); result.titleFilled = true; result.actualText = titlePm.innerText.trim().slice(0, 50); } if (titleTa) { titleTa.value = TITLE; titleTa.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); titleTa.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); titleTa.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur', { bubbles: true })); result.titleTaFilled = true; } return JSON.stringify(result);
steps.descript: 填写文章标题并触发完整输入事件（input/keyup/change/blur），确保 React state 同步
输入作者

steps.value: const bodyPm = document.querySelector('.view.rich_media_content .ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"]'); const ueditor = document.querySelector('#ueditor_replace'); const CONTENT = ARG || ''; const result = { bodyPm: !!bodyPm, ueditor: !!ueditor, contentLen: CONTENT.length }; if (bodyPm) { bodyPm.focus(); const r = bodyPm.getBoundingClientRect(); result.bodyPmRect = { x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }; result.bodyPmVisible = r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; bodyPm.innerHTML = ''; document.execCommand('selectAll', false, null); document.execCommand('insertHTML', false, CONTENT); if (bodyPm.innerText.trim().length === 0) { bodyPm.innerHTML = CONTENT; } // 触发完整事件序列，确保 React state 同步 for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) { bodyPm.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input', { bubbles: true, inputType: 'insertFromPaste', data: CONTENT.slice(0, 100) })); bodyPm.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup', { bubbles: true, key: 'Enter' })); } bodyPm.blur(); result.bodyFilled = true; result.actualLen = bodyPm.innerText.trim().length; } else if (ueditor) { ueditor.innerHTML = CONTENT; ueditor.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); ueditor.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); ueditor.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur', { bubbles: true })); result.ueditorFilled = true; } return JSON.stringify(result);
steps.descript: 输入正文并触发完整输入事件（input/keyup/change/blur），确保 React state 同步
等待正文图片渲染完成（用于'从正文选择'封面）

steps.value: const fromContentBtn = document.querySelector('a.js_selectCoverFromContent'); if (!fromContentBtn) throw new Error('未找到 从正文选择 按钮'); fromContentBtn.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); fromContentBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); const dialogs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog')); const dialog = dialogs.find(d => (d.innerText || '').includes('选择图片') && (d.innerText || '').includes('正文') && d.offsetWidth > 0); if (!dialog) throw new Error('未弹出选择图片弹窗（dialogCount=' + dialogs.length + '）'); const imgSpans = Array.from(dialog.querySelectorAll('.appmsg_content_img_list .appmsg_content_img_item')).filter(el => { const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; }); if (imgSpans.length === 0) throw new Error('弹窗内无可选图片: ' + dialog.innerHTML.slice(0, 1000)); const firstItem = imgSpans[0]; const r = firstItem.getBoundingClientRect(); window.__jlyl_cover_img_x = r.x + r.width / 2; window.__jlyl_cover_img_y = r.y + r.height / 2; return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, count: imgSpans.length, x: window.__jlyl_cover_img_x, y: window.__jlyl_cover_img_y, rect: { x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) } });
steps.descript: 点击 从正文选择 按钮（JS click 有效），获取第一张图片的坐标供下一步真实点击
真实点击第一张图片（Playwright mouse.click，触发 React 合成事件，JS click 无法选中图片）

steps.value: function getBgImg(el) { if (!el) return null; const inline = el.style.backgroundImage; if (inline && inline !== 'url("")' && inline !== 'url()' && inline !== 'none') return inline; const computed = window.getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage; if (computed && computed !== 'url("")' && computed !== 'url()' && computed !== 'none') return computed; return null; } const li = document.querySelector('.appmsg_content_img_list .appmsg_content_img_item'); const mask = li && li.querySelector('.card_mask_global'); const nextBtn = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog__ft button')).find(b => (b.innerText||'').trim() === '下一步' && b.offsetWidth > 0); const selected = li && li.className.includes('selected'); const maskVisible = mask && (mask.offsetWidth > 0 || mask.offsetHeight > 0); if (!selected && !maskVisible) throw new Error('图片未选中（li.cls=' + (li?li.className:'null') + ' mask=' + (mask?mask.offsetWidth:'null') + ' selected=' + selected + '）'); if (!nextBtn) throw new Error('未找到下一步按钮'); if (nextBtn.classList.contains('weui-desktop-btn_disabled')) throw new Error('下一步按钮仍禁用'); nextBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2500)); const dialogs2 = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog')).filter(d => d.offsetWidth > 0); const editDialog = dialogs2.find(d => { const t = (d.innerText || '').trim(); return t.includes('编辑封面') || t.includes('确认') || t.includes('裁切') || t.includes('拖拽'); }); if (!editDialog) throw new Error('未弹出编辑封面弹窗（visible=' + dialogs2.length + ' texts=' + JSON.stringify(dialogs2.map(d => (d.innerText||'').trim().slice(0,80))) + '）'); const confirmBtn = Array.from(editDialog.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => { const t = (b.innerText||'').trim(); return (t === '确认' || t === '确定' || t === '完成') && b.offsetWidth > 0 && !b.classList.contains('weui-desktop-btn_disabled'); }); if (!confirmBtn) throw new Error('未找到确认按钮: ' + JSON.stringify(Array.from(editDialog.querySelectorAll('button')).map(b => ({t:(b.innerText||'').trim(), disabled:b.classList.contains('weui-desktop-btn_disabled')})))); confirmBtn.click(); let bgImg = null; for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); const coverArea = document.querySelector('#js_cover_area'); const preview = coverArea && coverArea.querySelector('.js_cover_preview_new'); bgImg = getBgImg(preview); if (bgImg) return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, coverSet: true, bgImg: bgImg.slice(0, 150), attempts: i + 1 }); } const coverArea = document.querySelector('#js_cover_area'); const preview = coverArea && coverArea.querySelector('.js_cover_preview_new'); const previewDisplay = preview ? preview.style.display : 'null'; const previewComputedDisplay = preview ? window.getComputedStyle(preview).display : 'null'; const previewHTML = preview ? preview.outerHTML.slice(0, 300) : 'null'; throw new Error('封面未设置成功: previewDisplay=' + previewDisplay + ' computedDisplay=' + previewComputedDisplay + ' bg=' + (bgImg || 'null') + ' html=' + previewHTML);
steps.descript: 点击下一步 → 等待编辑封面弹窗 → 点击确认 → 轮询验证封面设置成功（最多 6 秒）

branch_steps.selector: //div[text()="声明原创成功后将获得平台著作权保护，并有可能得到推荐"]

steps.descript: 声明原创分支

steps.value: const btns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, .weui-desktop-btn, a.weui-desktop-btn, span.weui-desktop-btn')).filter(b => b.offsetWidth > 0); const publishBtn = btns.find(b => { const t = (b.innerText||'').trim(); return t === '发表'; }); if (!publishBtn) return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, reason: '未找到发表按钮', buttonTexts: btns.map(b => (b.innerText||'').trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 20) }); publishBtn.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); return new Promise(r => setTimeout(() => { publishBtn.click(); r(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, clicked: (publishBtn.innerText||'').trim(), rect: publishBtn.getBoundingClientRect() })); }, 500));
steps.descript: v1.9.0：点击底部'发表'按钮（接下来在弹窗中优先选择'发布'，不通知粉丝）
等待发表/发布确认弹窗

steps.value: await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); const dialogs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog, .weui-desktop-modal, [role="dialog"]')).filter(d => d.offsetWidth > 0); const bodyText = document.body.innerText || ''; const allBtns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, a, .weui-desktop-btn, [role=button]')).filter(b => b.offsetWidth > 0); const info = { dialogCount: dialogs.length, dialogTexts: dialogs.map(d => (d.innerText||'').trim().slice(0, 120)), buttonTexts: allBtns.map(b => (b.innerText||'').trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 30) }; const publishOption = allBtns.find(b => { const t = (b.innerText||'').trim(); return (t === '发布' || t.includes('不通知') || t.includes('发布图文')) && !t.includes('群发'); }) || dialogs.map(d => Array.from(d.querySelectorAll('button, a'))).flat().find(b => { const t = (b.innerText||'').trim(); return (t === '发布' || t.includes('不通知')) && !t.includes('群发') && b.offsetWidth > 0; }); if (publishOption) { publishOption.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'clicked_publish_option', mode: 'publish', clicked: (publishOption.innerText||'').trim(), info }); } const sourceDialog = dialogs.find(d => { const t = (d.innerText||'').trim(); return t.includes('创作来源') || t.includes('无需声明并发表') || t.includes('去声明'); }); if (sourceDialog) { const noDeclareBtn = Array.from(sourceDialog.querySelectorAll('button, a, [role=button]')).find(b => { const t = (b.innerText||'').trim(); return t.includes('无需声明并发表') && b.offsetWidth > 0; }); if (noDeclareBtn) { noDeclareBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'no_declare_publish', mode: 'mass', clicked: '无需声明并发表', info }); } } const agreeBtn = allBtns.find(el => { const t = (el.innerText||'').trim(); return t === '同意以上声明'; }); if (agreeBtn) { agreeBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'agree_statement', mode: 'mass', clicked: '同意以上声明', info }); } const massDialog = dialogs.find(d => (d.innerText||'').includes('群发通知')); if (massDialog) { const checkbox = massDialog.querySelector('input[type=checkbox], .weui-desktop-checkbox, .weui-desktop-switch'); if (checkbox) { const isChecked = checkbox.checked || checkbox.classList.contains('weui-desktop-checkbox_is-checked') || checkbox.classList.contains('weui-desktop-switch__on'); if (isChecked) { checkbox.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); } } const massPublishBtn = Array.from(massDialog.querySelectorAll('button, a, [role=button], .weui-desktop-btn')).find(b => { const t = (b.innerText||'').trim(); return t === '发表' && b.offsetWidth > 0; }); if (massPublishBtn) { massPublishBtn.scrollIntoView({block:'center'}); massPublishBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'mass_dialog_published', mode: 'mass', clicked: '发表', massNotifyDisabled: !!checkbox, info }); } return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'already_at_mass_dialog_no_btn', mode: 'mass', info }); } const continueDialog = dialogs.find(d => (d.innerText||'').includes('继续发表')); if (continueDialog) return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'already_at_continue', mode: 'mass', info }); throw new Error('发表弹窗未识别，无法选择发布/群发。弹窗内容: ' + JSON.stringify(info));
steps.descript: v1.9.32：在发表弹窗中优先选择'发布'，群发通知弹窗中先关闭群发通知开关再点击'发表'（不通知粉丝，不占用群发次数）
等待发布/群发动作完成

steps.value: await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); const dialogs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog, .weui-desktop-modal, [role="dialog"]')).filter(d => d.offsetWidth > 0); const continueDialog = dialogs.find(d => (d.innerText||'').includes('继续发表')); if (continueDialog) { const continueBtn = Array.from(continueDialog.querySelectorAll('button, a, [role=button], .weui-desktop-btn')).find(b => { const t = (b.innerText||'').trim(); return t === '继续发表' && b.offsetWidth > 0; }); if (continueBtn) { continueBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'continue_publish_clicked', clicked: '继续发表' }); } } const weixinVerify = (document.body.innerText||'').includes('微信验证') || (document.body.innerText||'').includes('扫码后'); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'no_continue_dialog', weixinVerify: weixinVerify });
steps.descript: v1.9.30：处理'继续发表'确认弹窗（点击群发通知弹窗的'发表'后可能弹出）

steps.value: await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const url = window.location.href; const stillOnEditPage = url.includes('appmsg_edit_v2') && url.includes('isNew=1'); const bodyText = document.body.innerText || ''; const hasWeixinVerify = bodyText.includes('微信验证') || bodyText.includes('扫码后'); const hasSuccess = bodyText.includes('发表成功') || bodyText.includes('发布成功') || bodyText.includes('已发表') || bodyText.includes('已发布') || (!stillOnEditPage && !url.includes('isNew=1')); const errorEls = document.querySelectorAll('.js_error_msg, .weui-desktop-toast--warn, .frm_msg.fail, .js_cover_error, .weui-desktop-toast--error, .weui-desktop-toast__content'); const errors = Array.from(errorEls).map(e => (e.innerText || e.textContent || '').trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 3); if (stillOnEditPage && !hasWeixinVerify && !hasSuccess) { throw new Error('发表/发布后 URL 仍为新建编辑页（appmsg_edit_v2 + isNew=1），动作未触发。错误提示: ' + (errors.join('; ') || '无')); } return JSON.stringify({ url, hasWeixinVerify, hasSuccess, errors });
steps.descript: v1.9.31：验证发布/发表成功（URL 跳转离开新建编辑页 isNew=1 或出现微信验证/成功提示；移除 .weui-desktop-dialog__bd 宽泛扫描避免误报）
